Grad Cafe Analytics
  • API Reference
  • View page source

API Reference

Note on Scraping Modules

The scraping and cleaning modules live in module_2/webScraper/ and are invoked by the Flask app via subprocess when POST /pull-data is triggered.

Flask App (app.py)

app.create_app(test_config=None)[source]

Flask application factory.

Parameters:

test_config (dict, optional) –

Overrides applied to app.config during testing.

  • TESTING : set True for Flask test mode.

  • SCRAPER_FUNC : callable (path, llm_file) -> None.

  • DB_LOADER_FUNC : callable (filename) -> None.

  • QUERY_FUNC : callable () -> dict.

Return type:

flask.Flask

ETL — Load Data (load_data.py)

load_data.combine_uni_program(university, program)[source]

Combine university + program into one string as the assignment requires.

load_data.create_new_database(new_database_name)[source]
load_data.delete_database(databaseName)[source]
load_data.load_data_into_database(filename=None)[source]
load_data.load_into_db(applicants, databaseName)[source]
load_data.main()[source]
load_data.parse_date(date_str)[source]

Convert ‘Mar 12, 2025’ to datetime.date object. Returns None if blank.

load_data.reset_database(databaseName, tableName)[source]

Queries (query_data.py)

query_data.get_connection()[source]
query_data.q10_phd_rejection_rate_by_year(cursor)[source]

Q10: What is the rejection rate of PhD applicants in 2025 vs 2026? Curious whether PhD rejection rates have changed year over year.

query_data.q11_phd_gpa_accepted_vs_rejected(cursor)[source]

Q11: What is the average GPA of PhD students who were accepted vs rejected in 2026? Curious whether GPA is a strong differentiator.

query_data.q1_fall2026_count(cursor)[source]

Q1: How many entries applied for Fall 2026?

query_data.q2_international_percent(cursor)[source]

Q2: What percentage of entries are from international students?

query_data.q3_average_scores(cursor)[source]

Q3: Average GPA, GRE, GRE_V, GRE_AW of applicants who provided these metrics.

query_data.q4_american_fall2026_gpa(cursor)[source]

Q4: Average GPA of American students in Fall 2026.

query_data.q5_fall2026_acceptance_pct(cursor)[source]

Q5: What percent of Fall 2026 entries are Acceptances?

query_data.q6_fall2026_accepted_gpa(cursor)[source]

Q6: Average GPA of Fall 2026 acceptances.

query_data.q7_jhu_masters_cs(cursor)[source]

Q7: How many entries applied to JHU for a Masters in Computer Science?

query_data.q8_top_schools_phd_cs_2026(cursor)[source]

Q8: How many 2026 acceptances from Georgetown, MIT, Stanford, or CMU for PhD CS?

query_data.q9_llm_fields(cursor)[source]

Q9: Do numbers for Q8 change using LLM generated fields?

query_data.run_all_queries()[source]

Run all queries and return results as a dictionary.

query_data.run_query(cursor, sql, params=None)[source]

Executes a query and returns all results.

Configuration (configuration.py)

configuration.get_configuration_filepath()[source]
configuration.load_configuration_file()[source]

Returns config dict if saved, else None.

configuration.load_json(filePath)[source]

Scraper (scrapeData.py)

webScraper.scrapeData.scrape_data(base_url, pageNum)[source]

Data Cleaning (cleanData.py)

webScraper.cleanData.clean_data(html_data, base_url)[source]
